"[8] STAM ADVS THEY DID SPEAK W/ RP WHO ADVS TO THEM HIS VEH WAS DOWN A DITCH - RP SOUNDED HEAVILY HBD - WAS SLURRING HIS WORDS"
"[4] RP ADVS VEH IS 3 MILES DOWN THE DITCH // RP SAW A CLOUD OF SMOKE AND WENT TO CHECK THE AREA"
"[3] RP ADVS TO STAM THAT ITS HIS VEH / NOW RP ADVS HE WAS RUNNING IN AREA AND CAME UPON 1124 VEH"

"[6] PER ICSO ** CLOSURE ON HAMMER RD FROM 98 TO ANZA - 98 WILL REMAIN OPEN - ONLY REQ'ING SIGNS** "
